human_verification.notes: Reviewed manifest, research summary, functionality map, scenario suite, evaluation results, deployment notes, commercialization notes, and readiness evidence for issue #1614.

market_ready_basis: Structured evidence supports the issue #1614 validated claim for a spec-first software architecture specialist.
The package records a complete research summary with no blocking unresolved ambiguity and explicit runtime prerequisites.
The evaluation suite covers 20 passing scenarios, exceeding the minimum count and pass-rate threshold.

Deployment and commercialization notes document specification-based runtime, rollback, tenant isolation, monitoring, packaging, buyer profile, and trusted-build promotion criteria.
notes: Runtime strategy remains specification-based. No trusted built implementation is claimed or retained.
Generated runtime artifacts should be disposable unless future production usage meets the trusted-build promotion criteria in the manifest and deployment notes.
